title: [FIRRTL][SV] Grand Central w/ Extract Test Code Can Create Bind-under-bind

features.name: nested bind statement in bind hierarchy
features.description: Code should include a bind statement where the target module is itself the target of an outer bind, creating illegal nested bind scope
features.snippet:
bind DUT MyView_companion MyView_companion ();
bind MyView_companion Wrapper_assert Wrapper_assert (.in(_DataTap_2__2), .reset(_DataTap_2__1), .clock(_DataTap_2__0));

features.name: bind statement targeting module bound to parent scope
features.description: Code should include a bind statement whose target instance is already bound via another bind statement in a parent scope
